_comment: Desired Home Assistant state, applied by scripts/provision_ha.py (IaC). ${VARS} are substituted from env/.env. Secrets (API keys) must come from env, never be written here. Integration 'title' must match the title HA assigns (Wyoming uses the service name; our flow titles are fixed).

integrations._note: Wake word = 'jarvis' via Porcupine (a built-in keyword; openWakeWord only has 'hey_jarvis'). The keyword is selected per-satellite from this provider.
integrations.title: porcupine1

integrations._note: url is host.docker.internal:8000 because the conductor runs NATIVELY on the Mac host for the real Claude brain (the subscription credential is in the macOS Keychain, unreachable from a Docker container). Use http://conductor:8000 only when running the conductor inside the compose network (echo/no-real-brain).
integrations.title: Jarvis
